UserAccount.title: User Account
UserAccount.description: User login credentials, profile data, swipes, matches, and chat messages.

swipes.description: Dictionary of swiped profile IDs and swipe direction

UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Information about a registered user, their MBTI type, preferences, and premium status.

lookingFor.description: Who the user is looking for (men, women, everyone)

isVerified.description: Whether the user is AI video-verified

verificationStatus.description: Status of the AI video verification

avatarUrl.description: Public URL to the user's avatar image

subscriptionExpiresAt.description: Epoch timestamp of when the subscription expires

PaymentMethod.title: Payment Method
PaymentMethod.description: Detailed payment instrument (e.g. Credit Card, PayPal) used for subscription bills.

type.description: Type of payment: card, paypal, gpay

isDefault.description: Whether this is the primary payment instrument

cardBrand.description: The card vendor, e.g. visa, mastercard

last4.description: Last four digits of the card number

email.description: Email associated with PayPal or external provider

Swipe.title: Swipe Action
Swipe.description: Records dating swipe direction on other user profiles.

Match.title: Match Connection
Match.description: A successful reciprocal dating match connection between two users.

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: Message log inside an active match conversation.

/accounts/{username}.description: Information about a user account including passwordHash and profiles.

/users/{userId}.description: Holds the primary profiles of registered users.

/users/{userId}/payment_methods/{methodI.description: Subcollection storing credit card or payment methods for subscribers.

/users/{userId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Individual messages sent or received by this user.
